title: EnphaseSystem
description: An Enphase Enlighten photovoltaic + optional storage system, as returned by /api/v4/systems.

system_id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the system.

public_name.description: Public-facing name shown on shared Enlighten dashboards.

timezone.description: IANA timezone the system reports in (e.g. America/Los_Angeles).

operational_at.description: Unix epoch (seconds) when the system started reporting.

last_report_at.description: Unix epoch (seconds) of the most recent telemetry the cloud has received.

last_energy_at.description: Unix epoch (seconds) of the most recent positive energy production.

system_size.description: Nameplate DC system size in kW.
